steps.t: Bounder Primstone is somewhere within the goblin-caves and may be in trouble! Halros has sent you to find Bounder Primstone beneath the Greenfields be…
Bounder Primstone was wounded in the caves deep beneath the Greenfields. You have found Bounder Primstone, but he has been hurt by the goblins.
Halros has found his way into Lubach's throne room at last and is waiting to speak with you about your victory.
